free_text: SOME SPECTROSCOPIC PROPERTIES OF FINE STRUCTURES
53-MG OF PA-231 OXIDE PAINTED ON BOTH SIDES OF A
N2. DIVIDED INTO THREE PAIRS OF OPTICALLY ISOLATED
CELLS VIEWED THROUGH QUARTZ WINDOWS BY PHOTOMULTIPLIER
USED TO DETERMINE SHAPE OF PA-231
SPECTRA. VALUES TAKEN FROM ENDF/B-V. MONITOR SAMPLE
TIME OF FLIGHT WITH FLIGHT PATHS OF 41.68 AND
18.30 METERS. VALID FISSION EVENT REQUIRES A
COINCIDENCE BETWEEN THE PAIR OF PHOTOMULTIPLIER TUBES
